title: Formation Constants of the Chelates of 2-Hydroxy-1-Naphthalidene-methylamine with some Bivalnet Metal Ions
author: M.S. MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Bombay-400019 

  Manuscript received 4 April 1975; accepted 13 June 1975.  

 Potentiometric studies have been carried on metal complexes of Cu +2  , Ni +2 , Co +2  , and Zn +2  with 2 hydroxy-1-naphthalidene-methylamine. The dissociation constants (pK 1  and pK 2 ) of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal complexes have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 30° ± 0.1 a and at ionic strength 0.1  M  in 75:25 per cent (v /v) dioxan-water medium. The order of stability of chelates is found to be Cu >Ni >Co >Zn, which is in agreement with that of Maley and Mellor.
